message.content:
{
  "analysis": "I have 306 commands but the game had 262 moves. There are duplicates and OCR noise. I need to clean this up more aggressively. Let me fix the solution by removing consecutive duplicates and fixing remaining OCR errors.",
  "plan": "Write a more aggressive cleaning script that removes consecutive duplicates, fixes common OCR errors, and produces a clean solution with approximately 262 commands.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /tmp/polish_solution.py << 'ENDPY'
with open("/app/solution.txt", "r") as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

import re

# More comprehensive OCR fixes
ocr_fixes = {
    'Dopen': 'open',
    'Dopen solid': 'open solid',
    'Dopen red': 'open red',
    'Dopen lid': 'open lid',
    'bogrd': 'board',
    'eage': 'case',
    'ceage': 'case',
    'elose li': 'close lid',
    'elose lid': 'close lid',
    'elose': 'close',
    '1lid': 'lid',
    '1li': 'lid',
    'Lid': 'lid',
    'su': 's',
    'wW': 'w',
    'gY': 'g',
    'drpo boat': 'drop boat',
    'drpo': 'drop',
    'boar_': 'board',
    'dro_': 'drop',
    'drop_': 'drop',
    'rin_': 'ring',
    'pray_': 'pray',
    'ease_': 'ease',
    'put _': 'put',
    'put_': 'put',
    'set _': 'set',
    'wren_': 'wrench',
    'get too_': 'get tool',
    'get s_': 'get sack',
    'put so_': 'put solid',
    'put al': 'put all',
    'open tra': 'open trap',
    'open sol': 'open solid',
    'slay trol_': 'slay troll',
    'get shar': 'get sharp',
    'get lam': 'get lamp',
    'get h': 'get head',
    'get all fr_': 'get all from cage',
    'ca': 'case',
    'lower ca_': 'lower cage',
    'case_': 'case',
    'tem_': 'temple',
    'temp': 'temple',
    'rub mirro': 'rub mirror',
    'def la': 'deflate',
    'def late boat': 'deflate boat',
    'ech_': 'echo',
    'ne.': 'ne',
    'd.': 'd',
    'get _': 'get',
    'get_': 'get',
    'A.': 'n',
    'A': 'n',
    'Y': 'y',
    'get head, jade,c_': 'get head',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg,go': 'get head',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg,golden': 'get head',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg, golden': 'get head',
    'get huge, tor': 'get huge torch',
    'get huge, torch': 'get huge torch',
    'get egg,sow_': 'get egg',
    'get egg, sword,1': 'get egg',
    'get egg,sword, lamp': 'get egg',
    'put sharp, po_': 'put sharp',
    'put sharp, pot,bu': 'put sharp',
    'put sharp, pot, bug': 'put sharp',
    'put bar,emera': 'put bar',
    'put bar,emeral': 'put bar',
    'get fork, trunk,b_': 'get fork',
    'get fork, trunk, bar,emeral': 'get fork',
    'put all but lamp,pump': 'put all but lamp',
    'drop all but pu': 'drop all but pump',
    'pum_': 'pump',
    'get lamp,clove,sc': 'get lamp',
    'get lamp,clove,screw': 'get lamp',
    'put torch,scr': 'put torch',
    'put torch,screw': 'put torch',
    'get fork,': 'get fork',
    'wind canary': 'wind canary',
    'kill man': 'kill man',
    'pu,': 'put',
    'pu': 'put',
    'set': 'set switch',
    'ulysse': 'ulysse',
    'move': 'move rug',
    'push': 'push all',
    'all': 'push all',
    'get': 'get',
    'put': 'put',
    'drop': 'drop',
    'get egg,sow': 'get egg',
    'get head, jade,c': 'get head',
    'tem': 'temple',
}

def clean_cmd(cmd):
    """Clean a command string."""
    cmd = cmd.strip()
    # Remove trailing special chars
    cmd = re.sub(r'[_.,]+$', '', cmd)
    cmd = cmd.strip()
    return cmd

# Process each command
processed = []
for line in lines:
    cmd = line.strip()
    if not cmd:
        continue
    cmd = clean_cmd(cmd)
    if not cmd:
        continue
    # Apply OCR fixes
    if cmd in ocr_fixes:
        cmd = ocr_fixes[cmd]
    # Skip single char noise
    if len(cmd) == 1 and cmd not in ['n', 's', 'e', 'w', 'u', 'd', 'y', 'g']:
        continue
    processed.append(cmd)

# Remove consecutive duplicates
final = []
prev = None
for cmd in processed:
    if cmd != prev:
        final.append(cmd)
        prev = cmd

print(f"Original: {len(lines)}, Processed: {len(final)}")
for i, cmd in enumerate(final):
    print(f"{i+1}. {cmd}")

with open("/app/solution.txt", "w") as f:
    for cmd in final:
        f.write(cmd + "\n")
print(f"\nSaved {len(final)} commands")
ENDPY
",
      "duration": 0.3
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
